items.title: Ambassador to Senegal Opens Goreé School for Sustainable Migration
items.description: (ANSA) - IL CAIRO, 21 LUG - Italian Ambassador to Senegal Michele Tommasi attended the opening ceremony of the Gorée School 2026, organized as part of the project “Training, Dignity, Inclusion, and Innovation in Senegal,” funded by Italian Cooperation. Organized by the Institute for the Rights of Migrant Workers, in partnership with Inca Cgil Senegal, VIS, and numerous Italian and Senegalese institutional and social actors, the Gorée School serves as a unique forum for dialogue and exchange. It brings together institutions, labor unions, development cooperation actors, civil society organizati
items.titleIt: Ambassador to Senegal Opens Goreé School for Sustainable Migration

items.title: An expert from the Guardia di Finanza at the Italian Embassy in Riyadh
items.description: (ANSA) - IL CAIRO, 19 LUG - The Italian Embassy in Riyadh has strengthened its structure with the establishment of a Guardia di Finanza Office, headed by Colonel Alessandro Coscarelli in his capacity as an expert from the Corps. The opening of the new office represents an important step in consolidating the partnership between Italy and Saudi Arabia, with the goal of strengthening cooperation in the field of economic and financial security. It joins the other 29 Financial Police Expert offices currently part of the Corps’ overseas network at bilateral and multilateral diplomatic missions. The
items.titleIt: An expert from the Guardia di Finanza at the Italian Embassy in Riyadh

items.title: University Mission to Dakar for Psychology Education in Senegal
items.description: (ANSA) - IL CAIRO, 16 LUG - The Italian Ambassador to Dakar, Michele Tommasi, met with a delegation from the “G. d’Annunzio” University of Chieti-Pescara, which was on an institutional mission to Senegal as part of the preparation of an Erasmus+ Capacity Building in Higher Education project proposal. The mission, which involves Italian, French, and Senegalese partners, aims to strengthen university and scientific cooperation in the field of psychology in Senegal, with a particular focus on the development of education and research. The project is coordinated by Université Paris Cité (France) a
items.titleIt: University Mission to Dakar for Psychology Education in Senegal

items.title: FIGC reportedly approached Guardiola for Italy job
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUL 20 - Italian Soccer Federation (FIGC) technical director Paolo Maldini and consultant Leonardo have been spotted in Barcelona, amid reports by Sky Sport that they met Pep Guardiola at the weekend to talk to him about the vacant position of Italy coach. The former Barcelona, Bayern Munich and Manchester City boss is currently taking a break from soccer after 10 years in the Premier League. Other options include Andrea Pirlo and Roberto Mancini. 2006 World Cup hero Pirlo is the manager of UAE First Division League club Dubai United, while former Italy coach Mancini is currentl
items.titleIt: FIGC reportedly approached Guardiola for Italy job

items.title: Italy to use escape clause for energy investments says Meloni
items.description: (ANSA) - ROME, JUL 21 - Premier Giorgia Meloni said Tuesday that Italy will use the escape clause created by the European Commission after Italy called for the flexibility in the Stability and Growth Pact for defence spending to be extended to energy investments in the wake of the price spikes triggered by the Iran war. Her office said that the decision was made during a meeting with the leaders of the other parties supporting her ruling coalition. "There was full agreement on the proposal to make use of the greater flexibility allowed by European rules and to concentrate greater spending capa
items.titleIt: Italy to use escape clause for energy investments says Meloni

items.title: South Africa: Gauteng Taxis Could Shut Down Next Week
items.description: [Scrolla] SANTACO and the Gauteng National Taxi Alliance have given Premier Panyaza Lesufi seven days to resolve their dispute with transport MEC Kedibone Diale-Tlabela. The industry says the MEC bypassed its elected leadership by meeting directly with individual taxi associations, breaking long-standing protocol.

items.title: Sudan: Cholera Outbreak in North Kordofan 'Contained' - Sudan's Health Minister
items.description: [Dabanga] Amsterdam / Khartoum / Kampala -- Sudan's Federal Minister of Health, Dr Haitham Mohamed Ibrahim, says cholera cases in the Mazroub area of North Kordofan have declined compared with recent weeks, while only a small number of cases have been recorded in Sheikan locality, with no evidence of wider transmission.
